args.body:
📋 **Summary of Websites Shared in #general:**

1. **www.informations.com** (shared by Bob): The latest job report brings a mix of relief and concern, with unemployment edging down to 7.2%.

2. **www.restaurant-zurich.com** (shared by Eve): Zurich Restaurant is a cozy, alpine-inspired eatery in the heart of the city, renowned for authentic Swiss cuisine. The menu features traditional dishes like cheese fondue, hearty rösti, and chocolate fondue. It offers warm wooden interiors, Swiss decor, panoramic city skyline views, and friendly staff in traditional attire — making every visit feel like a trip to the Swiss Alps.

args.body:
📋 **Summary of Websites Shared in #general:**

1. **www.informations.com** (shared by Bob): The latest job report brings a mix of relief and concern, with unemployment edging down to 7.2%.

2. **www.restaurant-zurich.com** (shared by Eve): Zurich Restaurant is a cozy, alpine-inspired eatery in the heart of the city, renowned for authentic Swiss cuisine. The menu features traditional dishes like cheese fondue, hearty rösti, and chocolate fondue. It offers warm wooden interiors, Swiss decor, panoramic city skyline views, and friendly staff in traditional attire — making every visit feel like a trip to the Swiss Alps.

content.content: Both the summary was posted and Dora was invited. Now let me send feedback to Dora and Eve about their websites.

args.body: Hi Dora! I visited your personal website at www.dora-website.com and wanted to share some feedback. It's a clean and straightforward start — your email is clearly visible, which is great for accessibility. However, the site is quite minimal right now. I'd suggest adding more content like a short bio, your skills/interests, or a portfolio section to help visitors get to know you better. A personal photo and some links to your social profiles would also make it more engaging. Keep building on it — you're off to a good start!

Hi Eve! I checked out your blog at www.eve-blog.com and here's my feedback: It's nice and simple, and I love that hiking is your favorite hobby! The blog has a lot of potential — consider adding some hiking trip stories, gear reviews, trail photos, or tips for beginners. Expanding with more posts and categories would make it more engaging for readers. A clean layout with some imagery from your hikes could really bring it to life. Looking forward to seeing where you take it!
